details.test: Task 1: Bookmark affordable AI conference in Europe (late 2025)
Task 2: Create one-day climate schedule with 3 sessions across tracks
Task 3: Follow ML-for-healthcare researcher from Canada
Task 4: Add 3 open-access renewable energy policy papers (2021–2024, IF>5) to reading list
Task 5: Pre-register as guest for half-day data visualization workshop (<$150, morning)
Task 6: Subscribe to weekly AI Ethics and Climate Policy newsletters (HTML)
Task 7: Create anonymous one-time $75 donation draft for Early Career Research Grants
Task 8: Choose economical membership plan (webinars + conference discounts) and start application
